title: Trying to create a ›has-prime-image‹ relationship with invalid MAGAZINE ISSUE ID
gherkin:
Given "MAGAZINE ISSUE" "Sieger-Typen" does NOT exist
And there exists a "IMAGE" "Cover"
When the user creates a "has prime image" relationship between "Sieger-Typen" and "Cover"
Then the request should be rejected with status code 404
